The Paris 2024 Olympic Games is just around the corner! Street dancer Kan Yicheng from Wuhan Sports University joins CGTN's Dance for Peace global breaking challenge and shows off some fluid breaking moves. Get ready with us to welcome the Games!

title: Get ready for Paris Olympics with CGTN's breaking challenge - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: The Paris 2024 Olympic Games is just around the corner! Street dancer Kan Yicheng from Wuhan Sports University joins CGTN's Dance for Peace global breaking challenge and shows off some fluid breaking moves. Get ready with us to welcome the Games!
